title: EasyGems
body:
DE: Eine Mod die 9 Items hinzufügt, welche Effekte geben. Man kann diese Gems durch Advancements bekommen.

EN: A mod that adds 9 items, which give effects. You can find these gems through Advancements.

Note: There can only be one Gem of each per server!

 

Permanent effects: 

    Wind Gem: Slow falling

    Aura Gem: Luck

    Orange Gem: Resistance

    Cyan Gem: Dolphins Grace, No Fall Damage

    Green Gem: Haste

    Pink Gem: Regeneration

    Greed Gem: Luck, Haste

    Corrupted Gem: Fire Resistance, Night vision

On Click Effects:

    Wind Gem: Speed, Cooldown; 30 Seconds

    Aura Gem: Pushes Entitys away. Cooldown: 30 Seconds

    Choas Gem: Explosion, Protection, Cooldown: 45 Seconds

    Cyan Gem: All players nearby levitate, Cooldown: 45 Seconds

    Pink Gem: Slow Moving, Resistance, Cooldown: 45 Seconds

    Green Gem: Swap positions with nearest player in 10 Blocks, Cooldown: 15 Seconds

    Corrupted Gem: all positive effects 10 Seconds, after Weakness, Slow Moving and Confusion, Cooldown: 2 Minutes

 

To get advancements:

    Wind Gem: Trial Chamber

    Aura Gem: sniper duel

    Chaos Gem: return to sender

    Greed Gem: distract piglin

    Orange Gem: Full Beacon powered

    Cyan Gem: fall from world height

    Green Gem: Explore Nether

    Pink Gem: kill axelotl target

    Corrupted Gem: Kill dragon
